svg.title: machine-translate-docx — detailed module architecture
svg.desc: Module-level architecture: every Python package under src/machine_translate_docx/, the HTTP layer, the four translation engines, the OpenAI tooling, the docx I/O layer, validators, translation memory, and the prompts + log + cache + failure-archive surfaces.
